name: prostate MRI — PI-RADS 5 with orphan measurement

report.findings: Peripheral zone: focal lesion in the right posterolateral mid gland (sector 7) with restricted diffusion and early enhancement. Transition zone: BPH. Seminal vesicles: no invasion. Lymph nodes: no adenopathy.
report.impression:
1. 14 mm right posterolateral peripheral zone lesion, PI-RADS 5.
2. No seminal vesicle invasion.
